e4a3853b50ac982b.text:
Dear Julia,

I just wanted to take a moment to thank you for everything you have done for me, words cannot even begin to express how grateful i am to have you in my life. You have been there for me through every up and down and i cannot imagine going through any of it without you by my side. The emotional support that you have given me has carried me through some of the darkest times and i will forever be grateful for your kindness and your patience with me.

You are honestly the best friend that i could ever ask for and i thank God everyday for placing you in my life. Please know that i am always here for you too, just as you have been there for me.

I love you so much my dear friend.

Warm regards,
D

0e0afd7e116011e5.text:
My dearest MJ,

From the day i met you i knew that my life would never be the same again, and standing here today i can say with my whole heart that being with you has been the greatest blessing that the Lord has given me. I love how we always make each other smile no matter what kind of day we are having, and how we cook together and play like we are little kids and never argue about silly things.

You always have so much patience with me even when i am being difficult, and that is one of the many things that i love about you. I love all those small walks we take in the evenings where we talk about anything and everything that comes to mind.

You mean the world to me my love, and i promise to love you for the rest of my days.

Forever yours,
D

983ee2117ed006f4.text:
Dear Bok,

I am writing this letter because i owe you a proper apology and i could not let another day go by without telling you how truly sorry i am. I took you for granted and that is something that i will regret for a very long time, you have been nothing but good to me and i did not honour that the way that i should have.

I am so sorry for lying to you about going out with friends when i actually went elsewhere, that was wrong of me and you deserved the truth. I am also sorry for not listening to you when you were trying to talk to me, i should have made more time and i should have been more present.

I promise from here on to never lie to you again. I hope you will find it in your heart to forgive me.

With love,
D

98950460fc5d3d18.text:
Dear Nom,

It has been such a long time since we last spoke and i have been thinking about you alot lately. I know i have been so busy with the new job that i barely had any time to catch up with anyone, and i feel really bad about that because you are someone i value so much.

I just got a new job and let me tell you, it comes with alot of challenges, both good and bad, and i would love to sit down with you and tell you all about it. During our team activities the other day we played some games and it reminded me so much of you and the times we used to spend together, and i thought to myself that i really need to reach out.

Please let me know when you are available to catch up, i miss you so much.

Kind regards,
D

0e69e6cec41959b4.text:
My handsome king,

The first time i laid my eyes on you i knew, deep down in my heart, that you were my person. I knew right then and there that you were the one that i wanted to spend the rest of my life with, and standing here today i can say that nothing has changed, only my love has grown stronger.

God has truly blessed me with you, and i promise to be by your side every step of the way, through every up and every down. I will love you, support you, pray for you, and stand tall with you no matter what life brings our way.

You are my best friend, my partner, my home. There is no one in this world that i would rather do this life with than you.

I love you, today, tomorrow and always.

Forever yours

aa66894ff30256e9.text:
Happy birthday to my high school sweetheart.

I just want to take this moment to tell you how grateful i am to have met a person like you. You are so much more than just a best friend to me, you are my soul sister, my life partner, and the person that i am choosing to do this whole life with.

I wish you all the very best that this life has to offer. May God bless you in every single way and may all the desires of your heart come to life. Here is to more life, more money, more peace, and so much success in everything you put your mind to.

You deserve all of it and so much more. I am so proud to call you mine.

Happy birthday my love. I love you.

a832540e3542b6e2.text:
My dear,
I want to begin by saying how deeply proud I am of you. Truly. I have watched you carry weights that would have broken many people, and you have done it with a grace that still astonishes me.
I know the pain and the suffering you are walking through right now, and I will not pretend that any words of mine can take it away. But I do want you to know that I see how you are handling the situation, with so much courage even when no one is watching, and that quiet strength has not gone unnoticed.
Think back to all that you have already overcome. You have done hard things before, and you came through them. You will come through this too.
I believe in you, completely, and I always will. Please lean on me whenever you need to.
With love,

589419d31d088d68.text:
Hello everyone, and thank you for letting me share a few words tonight.

When we were little girls, we used to lie on the bedroom floor and plan our weddings down to the very last napkin. White flowers, big cake, a husband who looked just so. Watching her tonight, I have to say she has done a far better job in real life than any of those daydreams ever did.

I met him a few years back, on a perfectly ordinary afternoon, and within ten minutes I knew. He was kind to her in that quiet, attentive way that you cannot fake. As her best friend of more years than either of us care to count, that is all I ever wanted for her.

So here is to the bride, my partner in crime since forever. And to the groom, welcome officially to the chaos. You signed up for it. No refunds.

Cheers, my loves.

e1fd246b449a5f34.text:
dear friend

i hope this letter finds you well, you've been on my mind alot lately and i thought, why not just sit down and write to you the old fashioned way for once. you weren't expecting a letter from me i'm sure, but here we are.

things on my side have been busy in a good way. work has been a whole journey of its own, lots of learning and lots of long days, but i'm growing. school is also keeping me on my toes more than i'd like to admit. the family is well, mama still asks about you everytime i mention your name.

i was at the market last weekend and saw those little yellow mangoes you used to love and honestly i just stood there smiling like a fool, the memories came rushing back. i hope one day soon we get to sit together again, maybe by the end of the year, and just laugh like we used to.

hearts and regards
Bulungu

2d7e9fc211723564.text:
dear friend
 i would like to take this moment . to celebrate someone who has been by my side for many years now . i have known you for almost 10 years and  if feels like we have grown up together , through every small and big season of life. i am so blessed to call you my friend , you are one in a million.
  the laughter we share , the long phone calls about nothing , the random meet ups for coffee that turn into hour long conversations , those little moments are what i hold dearest in my heart. i remember the time we got caught in the rain at the beach last summer and we just laughed until our stomachs hurt , i still smile when i think about it .
 the way you  show up for the people you love is something truly rare and beautiful. thankyou for being you, today and always.

with love

7f1950dc8582b011.text:
hi my friend i just wanted to say how truly sorry i am for your loss , i know how much that dog meant to you , he was not just a pet he was a part of your family and that kind of love is real love , no one can tell you otherwise.

your dog was amazing , the way he greeted everyone at the door, the way he stayed close to you even when you didn't say anything, that boy knew you in a way that few do , and you gave him a beautiful life filled with so much love

i am here for you my friend , whatever you need just say the word, if you want to talk i'll listen , if you want to sit in silence i'll sit with you , if you want to remember the funny stories i'll laugh and cry with you

may you find strength in this time , and please know that i will support you every step of the way , take all the time you need , im not going anywhere

ef6be69e29c91656.text:
My love

Nine years. Nine years since i first saw you walking across that university campus in a white shirt, your favorite colour to this day, and i remember thinking to myself this is going to be someone special in my life. Little did i know it would be you standing in front of me today as my forever person.

We have built a beautiful life together. Three little ones who carry both of our hearts in them, a home that we have created with so much love. I will never forget the small things, doing the house chores together, screaming at the TV when our team scores, those quiet evenings on the couch after the children are asleep.

You have been my friend, my partner and my home all in one. I promise to keep loving you, supporting you and choosing you, today, tomorrow, and for as long as God allows me to be by your side.

Thank you for choosing me my love

9b3e31369a63bb03.text:
Sending love to everyone in this beautiful premises. Look around. Just look around for a moment.

The groom standing there in his glory and the bride glowing the way only she can. Have you ever seen anything more beautiful? I haven't. The flowers, the lights, every single face in this room, everything about today is poetry.

I wanna take a moment to pour my heart out to the bride and the groom. To the bride, you are everything I prayed you would be on this day and so much more. To the groom, you have chosen well and I pray you treasure her every single day of your lives.

May your home be filled with laughter, may your love grow deeper with each passing year, and may God walk with you through every season. Love and light to you both. Love and light to all of us gathered here. Today is a blessing.

10b4420e8577f362.text:
My love,

Three years. Three years of growing into each other through challenges, through patience, through laughter that has carried us when nothing else could. Standing here today, I am not the same person you first met, and that is because of you, because of us, because of what we have built together.

Our faith has been the quiet thread holding us through it all and it has shown me, again and again, that love truly does rise above all things. You have seen me at my absolute worst and instead of stepping away, you loved me harder than I even thought to ask for. That kind of love is rare and I do not take it lightly.

I vow to protect the life we have built, to nurture the love that holds us, and to keep choosing you in the small ordinary days as much as in the big ones.

Forever with you,

9874c068878586e6.text:
hey ,i am writing to you today to say thank you for all the amazing things you have done for me , honestly l dont even know where to begin . you are such an amazing person and you have a kind heart, not many people can do what you have done for me, you went above and beyond when you didn't have to and i will never forget that.

l remember the days when l felt like everything was falling apart and you were right there , no questions asked , just showing up for me . you didn't make me feel like a burden you made me feel seen and loved. that meant the world to me l swear it did . you are a true blessing in my life.

l just want you to know that l see you and l appreciate you . may God bless you ten times over for the kindness you have poured into my life ,you are one of a kind and l am so lucky to call you my friend

35ab12d191877968.text:
Dear friend,
im writing to you because i know you have been carrying alot lately and i just wanted you to feel seen for a moment. the stress at work, the doubts about your abilities, that feeling of being isolated even when surrounded by people - i see all of it and i acknowledge how heavy it must feel.

you have been balancing so much, family pressures, the pressure to succeed, your own emotional exhaustion, and on top of all of that the relationship struggles that you havent really had space to even process. it is okay to feel a bit overwhelmed. anyone in your shoes would be.

please let me support you in the small ways. let me bring you tea, sit with you, send you a silly voicenote when you least expect it. these small gestures are not nothing, they are my way of holding you when words are not enough.

you are loved, deeply.

with affection <bulungu>

aece0ce8defd7e37.text:
Dear friend,

I was so sad and heartbroken to hear about your grandmother's passing. I can only imagine how deeply this pain is hitting every member of the family right now. Please know that my heart is heavy with yours during this time.

I will never forget that summer we all spent together. Grandma told us so many stories by moonlight, and we laughed until our cheeks hurt. She had this gift, an incredible gift, for making everyone around her laugh and feel included. Whether she was teasing us or pulling someone gently into the conversation, she made everyone feel like they belonged.

I know words cannot make this any easier, and I do not pretend that they can. But please know that you are not alone in this grief. I am here for you in every step of the way, in whatever way you need.

With love and deepest sympathy,
Joyce

1c28b011da2b1041.text:
Matt, my love, 

Six years. Six whole years and I finally get to blow the dust off of this little letter I wrote when I was much younger and far less wise. 

When I first met you, I have to be honest, I never liked you. You were the "play boy" you get in those cringy romantic movies or those Wattpad books I will never admit to reading. The captin of the university soccer team, of all things. Cliché beyond words. 

We saw each other around school, but we only really started speaking at that one party. And against every instinct I had, you weren't so bad. You were actually kind, funny, and oh boy, did you have a soft side that no one else got to see. 

Today, standing here, I realize you have been my favorite plot twist. 

I love you, you incredibly annoying soccer captin. Forever. 

Dani

fd53233ff0555e75.text:
My love, 

I know things haven´t been easy lately, and I know you´ve been trying so hard to stay strong even when it feels like the ground is shifting under your feet. I see it. I see how much you carry, and I see how much you don´t even let yourself admit how heavy it is. 

I just want you to remember that you´re not alone in any of this. Not for one second. I am right here, right beside you, your bear, your home, your safe place. 

You don´t need to have everything figured out right now. Truly, you don´t. The world will keep spinning whether you have a five year plan or not. Some seasons are just for breathing, for resting, for letting yourself be held. 

I love you, love you, love you, love you so so so so much, and we will figure the rest out together. We always do.

926fab43dd872a25.text:
my baby ,

you are beautiful, my goodness you are so beautiful and not just on the outside, the kind of beauty that comes from a kind soul shining through. you are so kind , the way you treat people , the way you love , the way you forgive even when its hard , thats not something everyone can do but you do it everyday

you are special in my heart in a way i cant even put into words , you are my best daughter in the whole world and i thank God everyday that he gave me you. there is no one else like you , there will never be anyone else like you

listen to me my love , whatever you need in this life , whatever your heart wants , you can do it , you will get it , dont let anyone make you doubt that. you are capable , you are strong , you are mine , and mommy is always in your corner cheering for you

i love you so much my baby

42ca7b6e3bb0e650.text:
Dear Mariam,

My heart has been with you these past few weeks. I know how heavy everything feels right now, the divorce, the house, all of it crashing down at once. I cannot pretend to fully understand it, but I am here, and I am not going anywhere.

First, please know how lucky you are to be surrounded by such a reliable group of friends who love you fiercely. They are all rooting for you, and so am I. You are not walking through this alone, no matter how alone it might feel some nights.

I want you to seriously consider something. Move in with me. I have the spare room, I have the space, and honestly I would love the company. There is no pressure, no rent, no timeline. Just somewhere safe to land while you figure out the next chapter.

You have always been there for me. Now please let me be there for you.

Yours sincerely,
Your friend.

82009e30d513c637.text:
When I think about us, I think about every season we have lived together, the thin and the thick, the boring Tuesdays and the impossible Fridays. We have overcome things big and small, the kind of things that fold most people in half, and somehow we kept finding our way back to each other. That is not luck, that is choice, made daily, by both of us.

If I had to go to war with only one more soldier I would choose you, every single time, no second guessing. You are my person in the deepest, most stubborn sense of that word.

I vow to tend to you, even when you nag me, even when you yell at me, especially then. To share my haves and my have nots with you, my best days and my worst, my whole and my half. There is no version of this life I want without you in it.

I love you. I am yours.

9ccb807a2d14e12f.text:
Dear Melisa, 

I hope this letter finds you well, and I hope that life has been treating you kindly. You have been on my mind for some time now, and I thought, instead of just thinking about you, let me actually sit down and reach out to you properly. 

I am writing to find out how you have been, truly. How is work? How is the family? How are you, in your heart? I want to know all of it, the good and the not so good. 

I miss you, my friend. I miss our long conversations, our laughter, even our silly arguments about absolutely nothing. Can we please meet for drinks soon and catch up properly? It has been a while, far too long if you ask me, and I think we are well overdue for a proper sit down. 

Let me know what works for you. 

With love, 
Lisa

f0d719c8ad7839d6.text:
My dear friend,

Words cannot describe how deeply sorry I am to hear about the passing of your loved one. My heart is heavy with yours today, and please accept my most sincere condolences during this incredibly difficult time.

I find myself thinking of all the good times we shared together, the small ordinary moments and the big celebrations alike. The way they would walk into a room and bring everyone's energy up just by being there. Their laugh. Their generosity. Those memories are now sacred, and I will hold onto them just as tightly as you do.

If you need me, in any way, I am here. To sit in silence, to bring food, to talk for hours, or to simply be present. Do not hesitate, not even for a moment, to call.

Once again, please know that I am so very sorry for your loss. May the love around you carry you through.

With love,
Emily

419a01288f33f2bb.text:
I would like to thank you for the moment you have given me to write to you and extend my deepest condolences. Your father was like a second father to me, the way he treated me from the very first day we met, with such warmth and respect and care. I never felt like an outsider in his presence, not once.

You don't know how devastated I was when I heard the news about your father. I had to sit down and just take a moment because I could not believe what I was hearing. He was such a good man, and his absence is going to be felt by so many of us.

I lost my parent too last year as you know, so definitely I kind of know how you feel, or maybe I should say I slightly know the feelings you are having now. The grief is deep, and it comes in waves. 

If there's anything I can do please let me know. I am here for you.

b1fa3814ea718c5f.text:
Hello brother!

It's been way too long, hope this letter finds you well. I have been meaning to write for weeks now and i finally sat down and made myself do it. 

First things first, i got the new job!!! Can you believe it? I start next month and I'm both nervous and excited. It's going to be a big change but i have a good feeling about this one. The pay is better, the team seems great, and the office is way closer to home. 

Life on this side has been busy busy busy. I moved into a new apartment, the family is doing well, mom still asks about you every other week. Work-life has been a whole rollercoaster but i think i am finally finding my balance. 

The other day i went to that little spot we used to chill at after exams, and bro, the memories came flooding back. Remember that time we got chased by that one waitress? laughs. 

Miss you bro. Write back!!

Frank

1067af3509ea3b54.text:
I know I said words I shouldn't have said during our argument and for that I am truly sorry. The things I let come out of my mouth do not reflect how I really feel about you and they should never have been said in the first place. 

I wish I could take back the hurt I caused you because I genuinely don't like seeing you like this. It breaks my heart to know that I am the reason for the pain in your eyes right now, and that is something I will sit with for a long time. 

You have always been such a kind and patient soul with me, even when I have not deserved it, and last night I let my emotions get the better of me. That is on me, fully, and no excuses will change that fact. 

I am asking you, when you are ready, to please give me a chance to make this right. I love you and I am so sorry.

dcc4fb0aa648e51c.text:
My dear friend,

I just want you to know that I see you and I understand how you feel. I know what triggers her, I know how those small comments can set off a whole storm inside, and I know that the place where you would like to be feels so far away right now. 

But listen, please. You are so important to us, more than I can put into words. The love we have for you is not something that depends on whether you are winning or losing, it just is, steady and full. 

That being said, I want to remind you of the importance of winning. Not winning to prove anything to anyone else, but winning for yourself, because you deserve to taste your own strength. You have done it before, more times than you give yourself credit for. 

We are with you. Stay blessed, my friend. 

Yours always.

5c6a335d497f35d1.text:
Thank you all for joining us today to celebrate this very special occasion. It truly warms my heart to see all of you gathered here in love and in joy.

We are here to raise a toast to a person whose presence has lit up our lives in ways that words can barely contain. On your delightful birthday, my dear, I just want to take a moment to honour the gift that you are to all of us. 

May God give you the strength and the wisdom to grow into every season that lies ahead. May He bless you with health, with peace, with laughter, with love, and with people around you who see you for the beautiful soul that you are. May every door that should open for you, open wide.

So please, let us raise our glasses high. Happy birthday to you, sweet friend. May this year be your best one yet. We love you, we celebrate you, and we are so grateful for you.

Cheers!

29c7894b4a688538.text:
im standing here today to celebrate someone who has truly made an impact in my life and in our community. when i think about her, the first thing that comes to mind is her kindness. the way she treats people, total strangers and close friends alike, with the same warmth and the same care. that is rare in this world and we should not take it for granted

her great sense of humor, my goodness, that woman can make you laugh in the middle of the worst day, she has this gift of finding the funny side of any situation. her generosity, the way she gives without expecting anything in return, the way she shows up for everyone in the community whenever someone is in need

on this her birthday, i just want to say thank you for being who you are, you have made my life so much better and i am sure many people in this room can say the same. happy birthday my friend, may God bless you today and always, i love you so much

063fd5c6034d024f.text:
Hello everyone,

When I look at the two of you standing here today, I cannot help but think to myself that you are truly meant to be together. I have had the privilege of seeing your love grow and flourish throughout the years, from those early shy days when you couldn't stop smiling at each other across the room, to the steady, deep, beautiful partnership that you have become. 

We celebrate your commitment to each other today, not just because it is a wedding, but because real love is rare and worth honoring. You have chosen each other, fully, eyes open, and that is something so special. 

May this marriage of yours be filled with laughter, with patience, with grace in the hard moments and with joy in the everyday ones. May you keep choosing each other for the rest of your days. 

Congratulations on your marriage and I wish you a lifetime of happiness. To the happy couple!

5ec1f0e9c9a1e3a2.text:
I want to use this opportunity to say thank you to God for saving me, again and again, even when I did not always know I was being saved. Looking back at all the seasons that have passed, I cannot help but feel deeply grateful and humbled.

There were seasons of loneliness at times, the kind that make you sit with yourself and ask all the hard questions. There were times when I was in need of help and I got it, sometimes from people I did not even expect, sometimes from total strangers who showed up at the right moment as if sent. There were times when I was sick and I got healed, when the doctors had said one thing but God had said another.

I feel so grateful for all of it. The lonely seasons taught me how to listen, the help taught me how to receive, and the healing taught me how to praise.

Thank you, Lord, for everything.

bb2cfbb303ac5721.text:
I really do not know how to begin to talk about you, my friend, so I will just start with what I know. Before everything else, before the crowds and the labels and the long days, we had something unique, something that did not need words to be understood. 

I think about all our memories now and they come in waves. The silly things, the long late night conversations, the way you would laugh at jokes only the two of us thought were funny. I keep trying to write them down before they slip away, but the truth is they are written somewhere deeper than paper.

There is an emptiness that you have left inside of my heart that I do not know how to describe to anyone who did not know us. Coping with the loss of you and trying to accept that this is now my life, has been the hardest thing I have ever done. I am still trying. 

I miss you. I love you. Always.

5e87b4b8ccd1fecf.text:
Dear friend,

I trust this letter finds you in good health and good spirits. It has been a while since I had a meaningful chat with you, and I miss our conversations more than I can put into words. Life has a way of pulling us in different directions, but I would like to think that real friendship does not lose its weight just because we are quiet for a while.

I would also like to share with you that I have relocated due to a new job to the cities. It is an adjustment, the noise, the pace, the people, all so different from what we are used to back home. But I am settling in, slowly, and finding my feet.

When are you free for a chat, preferably in the coming weeks? I would love to hear how you are doing, what is keeping you busy these days, and just to laugh together once more. 

Best regards till we meet,

0485c51372ba30fc.text:
Dear friend,

I am writing this letter to you because honestly, it's been so long since we've last talked, and I miss your company. Life has gotten in the way of things, as it tends to, but lately I keep finding my thoughts drifting to you and the years we shared.

How has your life been? I really want to know, the real answer, not the polite one. Did you end up following your dream career path, the one you used to talk about with so much fire in your eyes? I hope you did. You always had a way of making the impossible sound reasonable.

Also, and this is the question I have been dying to ask, did you ever end up getting a reptile for a pet? I think about that conversation we had every now and then and laugh. What are you up to now? Tell me everything.

Write back when you can, please. 

Sincerely,
Your friend

50f4a66d64b11fb3.text:
Dear friend,
I'm writing this with much love and even more conviction. You're standing at a crossroad and i can see the heaviness in your eyes, but believe me, purpose comes with clarity, and clarity is sharpened by every step you're taking right now, even the painful ones.
The sacrifices of today pave way for an easy future. I know it doesn't feel that way today, today the bills are loud, the doubts are louder. But the small consistent things you're doing now will compound into something that future you will thank you for.
Research and development are continuous tasks, even when we die, our works lives on. So keep building, keep refining, keep showing up for yourself. 
Also, this one i want to be very clear about, whether you do it now or not, you will be older than you're today in coming years. So you might as well do it now. Be the older you that the younger you would be proud of.
Love you buddy, you got this.

7df8c380782b6bc1.text:
Dearest friend,

I write this letter with so much love in my heart, just for you. Please do not worry, everything will be okay. I know it does not feel that way right now, I know the storm seems endless, but i promise you on every faith that I have, this season too shall pass, and you will look back at it as the chapter that built you.

Our dream lives will never be on a straight path. They are full of detours, and dead ends, and unexpected blessings tucked into the worst weeks. That is the design, my friend, not a flaw in the plan. 

Never settle and never give up. Always move forward, even if it is just a single small step on a single small day. Keep pushing, your journey is halfway through. The hardest part is behind you, even if you cannot see it yet.

I am cheering for you with my whole heart, today and always. Your friend forever.

ad0ece932d6fa964.text:
Hello everyone, please raise your glasses with me as we share this beautiful moment.

Congratulations to the newly weds! Today we celebrate the union of two beautiful souls who have chosen to walk this life together. I wish you guys nothing but a happy life together, filled with laughter, with love, with the small joys that build into a beautiful life.

Love each other and take care of each other always, even on the difficult days, especially on the difficult days. Become each others friends first, before anything else. The romance is beautiful, but it is the friendship that will carry you through the years when the romance gets quiet.

And please my dears, do not let any 3rd person to separate you. Whatever they bring, leave it at the door. This love is yours and yours alone to protect.

May God bless your home, your hearts and your future. Cheers to forever! Wishing you all the best my dear friends.

2059af395d0bf5eb.text:
I am so very sorry for missing our appointment yesterday. I have been sitting with this since last night, and I had to sit down and write to you properly, because a quick text felt like it would not do this justice.

The truth is that an emergency came up at home that pulled me away in a moment, and by the time I came up for air, I had completely failed to send word to you. I know that is no excuse for leaving you waiting and wondering, and I am deeply sorry for that. You have been such a good friend to me for so many years, and you deserved better treatment than what I gave you.

I would like to make this up to you, properly. Lunch is on me, your choice of place, your choice of day. I want us to sit, eat, talk, and laugh, the way we always do.

Please forgive me, my dear friend. I am truly so very sorry.

1324c7bb8589ba11.text:
Megan, my dear,

I was so sorry to hear about Rover. I have been thinking of you all weekend, and I just had to write to you properly rather than ping a quick message. The loss of a beloved family pet is a very real grief, and please do not let anyone tell you otherwise.

Rover lived a wonderful, full life, and slipping away from old age and natural causes is honestly the kindest goodbye a dog can have, even if it never feels kind to us who are left behind. He was so loved, and you gave him the best of everything.

I keep thinking about that morning you brought him into the office, and he made that absolute disaster of a mess by reception. The whole team is still talking about it, and frankly, it is a story we will be retelling for years. That dog had character.

Let me know when you are ready for a coffee, on me, no rush.

Love,

04aed27b35f4ef40.text:
I'm sitting down to write this letter to you with a mix of emotions running through me. But most of all, I'm feeling truly sorry for my part in what happened. I have realized that my actions hurt you and for that I'm deeply regretting,every single day since.

When I close my eyes I can still see your face, and I think about how I would feel if our places were swapped. It is not a thought I can sit with for very long without my heart breaking a little.

You have been nothing but good to me through all the seasons of our friendship,the loud ones and the quiet ones. I do not want this to be the chapter that ends our story, I really don't.

I am asking you, when you are ready, please give me a chance to make this right. I love you and I am truly so so sorry. With deep regret, Phemelo

0002799704688bf5.text:
Hi old friend!

It has been so long, and your profile keeps popping up on facebook every now and then which always makes me think of you and smile. So I figured, why not actually do something about it and write you a proper letter for once, like the old days.

Life has changed a lot on my end. I now have two boys, can you believe that? Two of them! And before you ask, yes they are exactly as wild as you would expect from any kid I would raise. I coach both of their sports teams, which has somehow become my entire personality now. I keep telling myself I am the cool dad coach but the kids beg to differ.

We also finally bought a house, but it is not far from where we grew up at all, you would laugh. Some part of me just couldn't leave home. I run into our mutual friends around town here and there, and your name always comes up.

Mom and dad are doing well, getting older but happy.

Miss you. Write back?

ceaefd2845285a78.text:
I am So sorry. I have been carrying this for days now and i finally found the words, or at least i hope these are close to the right ones.

Please find it in your heart to forgive me. I know that is alot to ask after everything that has happened, and I do not say it lightly. You have always been someone i hold so dear, and the thought that i am the reason you are in pain is unbearable to me.

It was never my intentions to hurt you. I want to be very clear about that. I let other things, my own stress, my own pride, get in the way of being the friend you deserved in that moment, and that is on me, fully. There are no excuses.

I will never forgive my self if you don't forgive me. So please, when you are ready, even if it takes time, please come back to me.

With love and regret,

d717383296ec1b17.text:
My friend,

Let's do things right. About growing, about showing up with integrity, the way you have been doing already, that alone sets you apart from so many people, and please do not forget that.

When you doubt, look at proof of your purpose. Look at the lives you have already touched, the small moments where you knew, deep down, that you were exactly where you were meant to be. That is not random. That is the road, lit up just enough for the next step.

The resilient to keep going when no one is watching, that is the real measure of a person. Not the loud applause, not the highlight reels, the quiet stubborn faithfulness when no one would even notice if you stopped. You have that in you, I have seen it.

Please enjoy every moment of life along the way. Even the busy ones. Even the messy ones. The journey is the gift.

Love you always,
Ania

db265a2a218e65a5.text:
Dear friend,

I'm writing this short note to thank you for coming to visit me in hospital last week. It meant more than I think you realise, and I have been thinking about it ever since.

It was a very scary time of my life and your support was hugely important to me, even just sitting there in that uncomfortable plastic chair making me laugh about complete nonsense. There is something about a familiar face in a sterile room that resets the whole day.

You travelled a long distance to get here and it is very much appreciated, more than I can properly put into words. Most people in your position would have sent a card and called it a day, and that would have been more than fine, but you got on a train and showed up. That is the kind of friend you have always been to me.

I very much hope to return the favour soon, in better circumstances. Drinks on me, as always, the moment I am back on my feet.

a4cf7d28f3c23b19.text:
Dear friend I want to take this moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to you for everything you have done for me recently. I really don't have words to describe how grateful I am to have a person like you in my life.

The way you stood by me when I was going through that difficult time, the way you took your own time to come and check on me and to make sure that I'm okay, that meant the world to me. Not many people would do what you did and that is the truth.

The impact of your action just to express it has been more than I can put on paper. You restored something in me that had gone quiet, you reminded me what real friendship looks like in practice and not only in words.

I appreciate our friendship how good you are as a friend, please don't ever change. I will share this gratitude with you forever, and I hope to be that kind of friend to you too one day. Thank you so so much my friend

5af862feaf00c325.text:
Hi Sarah

I have been meaning to write this for so long my friend, and I finally found a quiet moment to put my heart on paper. I want to thank you, properly, for being there for me during my divorce with my husband. I was really going through a lot during that time and you were such a good friend to me, in the truest sense of the word.

The way you showed up, again and again, without me even having to ask, that meant everything to me. And when you got me the professional help that I needed, that was the turning point. I was too proud to ask for it myself, and you saw what I could not see and you stepped in. 

Moving forward, I am taking one day at a time. I am thinking of slowly going back to studying part time, and just rebuilding my life on my own terms. 

Thank you my friend. Truly. 

Warm regards
Lakyn

dd063ed59dd17d38.text:
Dear Garry,
It has been so long! I'm writing this letter to say hi and to ask how you are doing. How is life on your side?
Life on my side is interesting. I am not having a job right now, and I'm actually surprisingly happy about it. I needed this break more than I realized. I have been trying to write a book for years now and finally I have the time and the space in my head to actually do it. It's slow going, but it feels good.
I have been thinking about coming back to my old office, just to say hello. I miss the people there more than I expected. I am also thinking about going abroad for a while, maybe a few months somewhere new. I haven't decided yet. 
Also, you'll laugh, I am obsessed about "The Long Walk" once again. I read it three times when we were younger and I just picked it up again last week. Some books just don't let you go.
Write back soon, please.
Love,

0a0c7ffc0da52ccc.text:
i want to take this moment to thank my friend david for everything he has done for me recently. it is hard to put into words how much your kindness has meant to me but i will try.

david you stepped in during one of the hardest weeks of my life and you did not even hesitate. you showed up at my door with food when i had not eaten properly in days, you sat with me in silence when i did not have the energy to talk, and you helped me sort out things i had let pile up because i was too overwhelmed to face them. that kind of practical help paired with such gentle kindness is rare in this world.

the difference your action made is something i will carry with me forever. you reminded me what real friendship looks like in the small everyday actions. your generosity has strengthened our friendship in ways that nothing else could have.

thank you my friend, i will always be grateful for knowing you and for the bond we share.

c9fe7f22a963998f.text:
Dear baby girl

I am writing you this short message because I know you have been struggling lately and I just want you to hear me say this one more time. This too shall pass. Healing has no time frame, do not let anyone make you feel like you are taking too long. There will be days where you will question everything and everyone, and that is okay, that is part of it. With time it will all work out in the end. I promise you this.

I was around when you tried your level best to make that relationship work, and I want to be very clear with you, NOTHING IS WRONG WITH YOU, IT IS HIS LOSE. Honestly. He could not see what was right in front of him and that is on him forever, not on you.

Now pick up your crown baby girl. Go back to that care free version of you, the one I miss so much. A relationship does not define you. You had a beautiful life before him and you will have an even more beautiful one after.

Love you loads.

848158a41a318ae3.text:
Dear Mark,

It has truly been ages since we last properly spoke, and I have been carrying this letter in my head for months now. The lack of communication between us, mostly thanks to covid-19 and all the travel restrictions that came with it, drifted us apart in a way I never wanted. But here I am, finally putting pen to paper to set things right. 

I finally found a new job after years of piece jobs, learnerships, and applications that went into the void. It is in the cities, away from home and from everyone else, but I am proud of myself for sticking it out long enough to get here. I am proud of you too, Mark, more than I have probably said out loud, your achievements and the spotlight you have earned have been a quiet inspiration to me throughout this stretch.

Let us please consider a friends catch up trip soon, maybe somewhere halfway between us. I miss you, brother. 

Yours in friendship!
Jabbs

c5d204b7800d12f8.text:
to my dearest friend
there are no words big enough to capture how grateful i am for your kindness over these past few weeks. you have been a quiet steady light in my life and i just want to take a moment to honour that.

you have brought so much joy into my world, even in the smallest moments, your laugh, your random voicenotes at midnight, the way you remember tiny things i mentioned weeks ago. that kind of care is rare and i do not take it for granted. our friendship is one of the most important things in my life, you are honestly my person.

i want to thank you specifically for showing up at the hospital that morning when i did not even ask you to come. you just appeared, with coffee and that ridiculous smile of yours, and you sat with me until everything stopped feeling so scary. i cannot describe what that meant emotionally, it cracked something open in me in the best possible way.

here is to many more years together my friend. i love you so much. cheers to us!

d21e5fe7d8a581a8.text:
Hello Jo!

It has been a while since we last spoke and I have been thinking to come visit you, because I have really missed you. Life keeps getting in the way of plans like that, but I am determined to make it happen this time.

I have some big news to share with you. I got accepted into a PhD position! I still cannot believe it myself, after all those years of doubting whether it would actually happen. It starts in the autumn and I am equal parts terrified and thrilled. I would love to hear your thoughts.

Also, and most importantly, congratulations on your marriage! I am so happy for you both. I am sorry I could not be there in person, but please know that I was thinking of you all that weekend. How is married life treating you so far? Tell me everything, the good, the funny, the slightly chaotic. I want to hear all about it.

Let me know when would be a good time to come and visit.

With love,
Susan

f12a4131d2ae46fc.text:
Dear Zoe,
I know it’s been forever, but I’ve been thinking about you so much lately. I just had to sit down and write to you the old fashioned way.
Guess what? I just started a new job at a cozy little bookstore on Main Street. It’s the kind of place where the smell of old paper hits you the second you walk in, and the front window has a sleepy cat that judges everyone. I love it already.
The other day a girl came in and dropped a whole stack of books right by the front desk. The thud was so loud the cat actually jumped. And I just stood there laughing because all I could think of was that day in the school library when we knocked over the entire library cart, and Mrs. R looked at us like we had personally ruined her life.
Also, I have been trying to learn guitar again. I keep humming those goofy made up tunes we used to sing on the bus. I miss you, Zoe.
Write back, please.
Love,
Your cousin

f666f705042fcc46.text:
Dear friend,
I am writing to thank you, sincerely, for everything you did for my cousin recently. Your kindness has truly touched my heart, and I want you to know that what you did has not gone unnoticed.
When she was at her lowest, you offered her emotional support without ever making her feel like a burden. You also stepped in with practical help when no one else thought to, and that made all the difference in the world. You did this without expecting anything in return, which is exactly the kind of person you are.
Your kindness has made a big difference in her life and, by extension, in mine. I feel so grateful and deeply touched by your generosity. Family is everything to me, and to see someone outside the family love mine like their own, that is rare and precious.
I value our friendship more than I can put into words. I hope to return the favor someday, in any way you might ever need.
With all my love,
Your loyal friend

be5945d3116f1743.text:
Hey 
I heard from a mutual friend that you are stressed about work lately, and I wanted to reach out properly because a quick text did not feel like enough.
First of all, you do not have to face this alone. I know it is easy to slip into that mindset of carrying everything yourself but please remember that I am right here, just one message or call away.
I have known you for years now and I have seen you handle situations that would have broken most people. You have always been strong even in tougher situations than this one. Remember when you were juggling all of those final exams while taking care of your sister at the same time? You came out of that stronger and so much more capable, and you will come out of this one too.
I believe in you and I am here to support you in any way you need. Things will get better soon, even if they do not feel like it right now. 
Its okay to take a break and rest. 
Love you my friend

e69fd330a948b595.text:
Hello my dear friend,

I have been thinking about you so much lately and I had to put pen to paper. I know life has been throwing lemons at you and I just want to remind you of one thing, please know that I will never leave you. Not when things are easy, not when things are hard, especially not when things are hard.

We have walked through fire together before, you and I. We will get through this together and conquer as we always do. That has always been our way, hasn't it. We laugh, we cry, we plan, we keep going.

One day we will look back on this season and reminisce about it over a glass of wine, and we will laugh at how heavy it felt at the time, even though right now it feels like it might break us. It will not break us. We are stronger together.

Keep well and take care of yourself. Love and light to you my friend, always.

f16cf3f67252ee09.text:
Dear friend,

I write this letter to say thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for the gift of love you have shown me. I really appreciate your generosity more than I can put into words, and I will never forget what you did for me.

I want you to know that I never expected that anyone would help me in my situation. I had reached a point where I had quietly accepted that I was going to have to figure it all out on my own, and I had made my peace with that, even though it weighed me down more than I let on.

And then there you were. Without me asking. Without me hinting. You just saw me and you acted. I am deeply touched by your generosity, and by the fact that you did this with no expectation of anything in return. That is the rarest kind of kindness.

I promise to carry this lesson with me and to be that kind of friend to others, just as you have been to me. Thank you, truly.

aba8c6b52a01e4f0.text:
Hey friend

I just wanted to drop you a note today because i have been thinking about you and i feel like you needed to hear this. Please remind yourself that you are not alone in this, no matter how isolating it feels in your head right now.

From where i am sitting, you are doing well. I know you cannot see it from the inside but trust me on this, you are doing better than you think. The fact that you are still showing up everyday, still trying, still being kind to the people around you, that is doing well by any honest measure.

I am always going to be here when you need help. Whether you need someone to listen, someone to bring you food, or someone to just sit on the phone in silence, just call me, anytime, day or night.

You are strong and capable, and you have proven it many times over. I am so proud of you my friend, please do not forget that, even on the hard days.

Love always.

5f2185dffca25c88.text:
From the moment I met you, I knew you were someone special. You loved me for who I was, you showered me with lots of love, and you made everything seem possible. I love you (kiss).

As we stand here today, in front of the people who matter most to us, I promise to love you unconditionally, on the easy days and on the hard ones. I promise to support your dreams, even the wild ones, even the quiet ones you only whisper to me late at night. I vow to laugh, cry, and build a life together that is filled with love, joy and adventure.

You are my best friend, my home, my safe place, my biggest dream come true. There is no one in this world I would rather walk this life with than you.

Thank you for choosing me, today and every day. I choose you back, completely and forever.

I love you, my one and only.

61c0ac83ee0f5b68.text:
Dear my good friend,
I write this letter to say thank you for everything, for the support i received during my research period that almost broke me. You have no idea how much your support has impacted my career.

There were days i wanted to give up and you kept calling and reminding me why i started in the first place. You read my drafts late into the night, you cheered for the small wins that no one else would have noticed, and you sat with me in the failures without making me feel small. That kind of friendship is rare.

My career today, the doors that have opened, the opportunities i now have, all of it carries your fingerprints. I will never forget that. A future connection between us is something i deeply value, and i pray to God that we keep walking through life as friends for many many years to come.

My final appreciation is simple, may God reward you abundantly for being you. Thank you my friend, forever and always.

75bd4c8dfb9928e0.text:
Dear friend,

I have been thinking about you a lot this week, and I wanted to write to you properly rather than just text. I know you have been feeling anxious about this major career change, and on top of that the uncertainty about your marriage and what your future even looks like. That is so much to carry at once, and I want you to know that I see it.

It is so normal to feel lost when life is shifting in many directions at once. Truly. Please do not be hard on yourself for not having it all figured out right now - very few people would, in your shoes. The clarity will come, in pieces, in the moments where you would least expect it.

For now, please be gentle with yourself. Maybe a long walk, a hike, a quiet coffee somewhere new. We can do that together this weekend if you want.

I am here, in any way you need me. 

With warmth and love,
Lisa

7c1f586187f6bf80.text:
dear friend,

I have been sitting with everything that happened between us last week and i finally have the courage to write to you about it. I am so sorry.

I know what caused the argument was something small on the surface, but i let weeks of frustration and miscommunication build up and i exploded over the wrong thing at the wrong time. when i think back to it now, i cannot believe i let myself say some of those things to you, of all people.

i acknowledge my mistakes, fully. there is no excuse, only my own poor handling of emotions that should have been spoken about long before they reached that point. how i feel about everything that happened is honestly remorse, deep remorse, and a quiet sadness for the hurt i caused you.

i take responsibility for my mistakes. i would love to make amends through a long walk and a proper sit-down conversation, on me. i promise to do better, communicate sooner, listen more.

Love
Karabo.

7d6769c1104a3d36.text:
Hi Fred,
I wanted to write to you about the loss of your mum. I am so sorry to hear about her passing- I know how close you both were, and what a wonderful relationship you shared.
Your mum was, of course, the most supportive and encouraging woman I have ever met. She had this way of believing in people even when they did not yet believe in themselves- and she was very loving with it, always.
I have so many fond memories of her- the way she would make tea for everyone the moment they walked through the door, and how she would ask after every single member of the family by name. Those small gestures meant so much.
She will, I am sure, rest in peace with the Angles- both of us being religious, I take real comfort in that, and I hope you do too.
If there is anything I can do to help, please do let me know- I am here for you, mate.
From,
X.

da28238e1270597e.text:
Hey friend!
I have been meaning to write this for ages, but you know how life gets.
I just wanted to take a quiet moment to thank you for being there for me when I went through that hard time with my health. Honestly- I do not think you realise how much your presence carried me through it.
I really appreciate how you always go the extra mile to make me feel the best, even on the days when I am clearly not at my best myself. The little voicenotes, the meals you would drop at my door, the way you would just sit on the phone in silence with me when I had no words- all of it meant the world.
I just wish I could return the favor and be there for you, too, when you need it- and I really hope you will let me, the next time something comes up. Friendship has to go both ways, and you have given so much already.
Let's catch up properly soon!
Take care,
Jennie.

7dc39f0274c87d04.text:
My best friend Pedro, where do I even start.

Twenty years. Twenty whole years of friendship and you still find ways to surprise me. The big surprise birthday party you hosted for me last week was the most beautiful thing anyone has ever done for me, and I want you to know that I will carry the memory of that night with me for the rest of my life.

I was so overwhelmed with joy when I walked through that door and saw all those faces, all those people you had quietly gathered together for me. I could not believe that you did that for me. The food, the music, the little speeches, every single detail of it had your love written all over it.

It was the best thing because, honestly, I had never had anyone do such a thing for me before. Twenty years and you keep finding new ways to be the kind of friend I do not deserve.

Thank you Pedro. With all my heart, thank you. I love you, my brother.

c153338ecc23bfbb.text:
My friend, I am sincerely sorry for the pain I have caused you. I have been sitting with this for some time now and the weight of it has not lifted, because I know how much I have hurt you and that is not something I can easily forgive in myself.

It was never my intentions to hurt you. Please know that. The choices I made in that moment were poor, and they came from a place of frustration that should never have been directed at you. I hope you find it in your heart to forgive me, even if it takes time, and I will respect whatever time it takes.

I admit I was at fault and I take full accountability for the way I behaved. There are no excuses, only my own failure to handle myself the way you deserved. I assure you it was not intentional and an honest mistake, but I also understand that the impact was very real to you, and that matters more than my intent.

Please let me make it up to you.

9989d969ce8dbccf.text:
Hey friend,
I have been carrying this for some time now and I just need to come out and say it properly. I am the one who told our friend about your cousin cheating. There, I said it.

I know that has caused alot of tension between you and me and i acknowledge that the awkwardness over the past few weeks is because of my actions, no one elses. I see it and I feel it everytime we are in the same room and I do not want it to keep growing into something bigger than it has to be.

My intention was never to betray you. I genuinely thought i was being honest and protecting a friend who deserved to know what was going on, but i can also see now that this was not my place at all and i should have come to you first. That was my mistake.

I value our relationship more than i can put into words and I want to do the work to build trust again. Please, when you are ready, let us talk about it.

With love.

93d5dd6d4a68593f.text:
Hello everyone, thank you for being here today to celebrate Tasha.

Tasha and I met in our first year at University. We used to see each other in the study locks, both of us trying to look like we knew what we were doing, neither of us really fooling anyone. Eventually we just started talking and one quiet conversation turned into another, and somehow we became friends without ever really planning it. That has always been us.

Tasha has always being true to me, in every season. She has never made me feel like I was begging for more, like I was asking for too much, or like I needed to earn my place in her life. Anyone who has ever had a friend like that knows how rare and precious that is.

So on this special day, please raise your glasses with me. To Tasha. To the friend who showed me what real friendship looks like. May this season of your life be the most beautiful one yet. I love you so much, my friend.

Your friend
Tracey

525c241ee168d0f1.text:
My childhood friend. I am writing this letter today because you have been on my mind a lot lately and I miss you so much. I want you to know that I treasure every memory we shared growing up.

I smile every time I think of our secret handshake, the one we made up that one summer afternoon and refused to teach to anyone else, the one that we still remember even now if we tried it. I think of all those weekends and after school days when we would just play together for hours until our parents had to call us home for dinner.

Do you remember our love for dancing and singing? We would put on those silly little performances for anyone who would watch and even more often for an empty room. We were ridiculous and we were so happy.

I would love to have a proper catchup session with you soon. A long phone call, or even better a visit if we can plan one.

I love you and I miss you a lot.

6cd7ada0394331c3.text:
My love.
We have been together for 2 years and today we have decided to take a vow together in front of God and our families. We are leaving the old life behind and choosing to grow together, in faith and in love and in everything that lies ahead.

We will build our legacy together, brick by brick, with patience and with prayer. Whatever we have, whatever we earn, whatever we create, we do it together as one. We will not chase noise or recognition. We will work hard and let success speak for its self in time, when God says it is time.

May God guide us through every season. May He keep us humble when things go well, and faithful when things are hard. May He bless our home and the children He chooses to give us. May our union be a light to those who watch us.

I take you as my partner, my home, my forever. With all that I am, I love you.

782c6579e7a78ea1.text:
Hello my old friend,

I hope this letter finds you well, I have been thinking about you for some time now and I am genuinely excited to be reconnecting after all this time. It has been far too long, and I do not want another year to go by without us catching up properly.

First things first, how are you? How is work treating you these days, are you still in that same role or have you moved on to something new? How is the family, please send my regards to everyone. And what about your hobbies, are you still doing the same things or have you picked up something new along the way? I want to know everything.

A brief update from my side, life has been busy in the way that adult life always seems to be. Work is good, family is well, and I have been trying to make more time for the people who matter, which is part of why I am writing today.

Write back when you can.

Your bestfriend

6f900b0de827eaa2.text:
Good day to everyone gathered here today. I had the rare privilege of knowing the amazing soul we are burying today, and standing here now I feel both the weight of his absence and the warmth of his memory at the same time.

He was the kind of man who pulled people in. He was involved in community service in such a deeply genuine way that everyone around him eventually volunteered too, because how could you not, watching him work. He did not lecture, he did not preach, he simply showed up, week after week, and the rest of us followed.

I vividly remember how he singlehandedly organized that charity event for the disabled. From the venue to the meals to chasing down sponsorships, he carried every single piece of it on his own shoulders, refusing help because he wanted it done a certain way. The day itself was beautiful, and the smiles on those faces will stay with me forever.

He lived in a way that made the rest of us want to be better. May his soul rest in peace.

Yours Faithfully.

e45447a375d3ad62.text:
Good evening everyone

My name is Loretta and l am the big sister to the bride. Today is a very special day for our family and l want to take a moment to celebrate my little sister.

We have been trhough alot together, my sister and l. From childhood scraps, to teenage drama, to the harder seasons of our adult lives, we have walked through it all hand in hand. There were times when it felt like it was just the two of us against the world, and somehow we always made it through. Watching you stand here today, in this dress, with this smile, makes my heart so full l could cry.

And to the groom, am happy that now l have a brother. Please take very good care of my little sister, she is precious to me.

l want you guys to always pray together, in good times and in tough times. That is the foundation.

Now let party today be the best day! l love you both!

Loretta

91ed26e27bc2b8dd.text:
Hey Mike,
Hope you've been well bro. It's been on my mind for some time now, and I knew I had to write to you properly to say sorry for what happened.

The nature of the offence is something I am not proud of at all. It was committed last month, at the family gathering, when I let my temper get the better of me and said things in front of everyone that should never have left my mouth, especially not in that setting. I am sorry. I really am.

The reason I am sorry is because I know how my actions affected not just you but also Mary and the kids, and the wider family who had to sit through it. That is on me, and I take full responsibility for the embarrassment and the hurt I caused.

I pledge not to repeat this offence. I am working on my temper and on stepping away when I feel myself losing the plot. As for reparations, please let me know how I can make it right.

Yours,
Dave

f50299daaea2810b.text:
TODAY IS YOUR GROWING DAY, MY DEAR FRIEND. I am standing here with so much joy in my heart to celebrate you on this special occasion, and to wish you nothing but the very best.

May you grow in your businesses my friend, in every venture you put your hands to. May your hands be blessed and may every door open at the right time. May you grow in your love life, with peace and with respect from the one who is meant for you. And may you grow in your family, in unity, in laughter, in support that does not run dry.

May you encounter more blissful moments in this new year of life than in all the years before put together. Yesterday you were a child, now you have grown into someone we are all proud to call our friend.

Please continue to make rational decisions, even when the world says otherwise. Wisdom has carried you this far, and it will carry you further still.

Happy birthday my dear. Cheers!

3ad2fbafa59b550d.text:
My love,

I cannot quite believe we are standing here today.  We met what feels like a lifetime ago, on a perfectly ordinary afternoon that turned out to be anything but ordinary, and from that very moment I think a small part of me knew.  We have been together for five years now, and every single one of them has felt like a gift I did not see coming.

The day you proposed I will never forget - down on one knee in the place that means the most to us, you were so nervous you forgot half of your speech.  My favourite moment of us, though, is still that quiet evening on the balcony last summer when neither of us said a word for almost an hour and neither of us felt the need to.  That is real love, in my book.

I promise to love you forever, in the small ordinary days and in the big ones.  I am so excited to spend the rest of my life with you.

I love you so much.

Your Bride x

c647d34febeef8f5.text:
My dear friend,

I'm honored to stand here today and celebrate an incredible person, someone who has been a part of so many of my best memories.

I'll never forget our epic road trip adventure, laughing and singing our hearts out at the top of our lungs, completely off-key, not caring that the windows were open. That trip captured everything I love about you - the way you turn ordinary moments into something we still talk about years later. I have so many fond memories from that one weekend alone, never mind the rest of the time we have known each other.

We've shared countless memories, and I'm grateful for every moment. From laughter-filled braais to quiet conversations that went on long past the time we should have been asleep. You have a way of making people feel seen and heard, and that is truly special.

So here is to you, my friend, on your special day. May this year be filled with even more adventures, more laughter, and more memories worth keeping. Sending all my love.

b4483e9ddc18e57a.text:
dear friend, i write this letter today to send my deepest condolences on the passing of our brother. i still cannot believe he is gone, my heart is heavy as i sit here trying to put words on paper.

i still remember the day we met, it was at school during break time and we ended up sharing a bench by accident, that is how we became friends, just like that, no big drama. from that day forward we would spend most of our time together either at school or at the local park, walking and talking for hours about everything and nothing

the activities we used to engage ourselves in were so simple, playing games, watching matches together, riding our bicycles around the neighbourhood. his personality was so calm, so funny in a quiet way that you only got if you knew him well, and the shared memories i have of him will stay with me forever.

the last day i saw him he was laughing, and i hold on to that.

am very sorry my friend

ff0e90914c81c08c.text:
DEAR FRIEND, I HOPE THIS LETTER FINDS YOU WELL. I HAVE BEEN MEANING TO WRITE FOR SO LONG AND I FINALLY HAVE THE COURAGE TO SIT DOWN AND PUT MY HEART ON PAPER.

FIRST OF ALL I WANT TO TELL YOU HOW MUCH I MISS YOU. NOT A WEEK GOES BY WHEN I DO NOT THINK OF YOU AND OF THE GOOD OLD TIMES WE SHARED. I REMEMBER OUR LATE NIGHT TALKS, OUR ENDLESS LAUGHTER, AND ALL THE LITTLE WAYS YOU MADE ME FEEL SEEN WHEN NO ONE ELSE BOTHERED.

I ALSO WANT TO TAKE THIS MOMENT TO THANK YOU FOR ALL YOUR ENCOURAGEMENT OVER THE YEARS. YOU ALWAYS BELIEVED IN ME EVEN WHEN I DID NOT BELIEVE IN MYSELF, AND I CARRY THAT WITH ME EVERYWHERE I GO.

FINALLY MY FRIEND I WANT TO TELL YOU SOMETHING IMPORTANT. I GOT THE JOB. I REALY DID. I WILL BE MOVING IN A FEW WEEKS TO START THIS NEW CHAPTER, AND I AM EXCITED AND TERRIFIED AT THE SAME TIME.

I HOPE WE SEE EACH OTHER SOON. I LOVE YOU

fade8a018a6b3a9e.text:
My friend,

It has been such a long time since we last talked, and a lot has happened since then. I have been meaning to reach out, and i wanted to write properly rather than send a quick message, because some things deserve more than that.

First, please tell me how is life going with you? I want to hear all the updates, the big ones and the small ones. Tell me about work, about home, about whatever is keeping you busy these days. I have missed your stories.

From my side, life has been a mix of good and hard, like it always is. I have been growing, learning, occasionally failing, and slowly putting things back together. Nothing dramatic, just life.

I also wanted to write because I heard recently about your mother's death and i am so deeply sorry. i know how close you were and i cannot imagine the weight of that loss. please know my thoughts have been with you a lot.

With love, your friend

f5f1c24e736a6cdf.text:
My love,

I feel privileged to stand here today before our family and friends to express my love and commitment to you. Let me take you back to where it all began.

When we met five years ago at that small coffee shop, I had no idea you would change my life this way. We got each others interest through long conversations that always seemed to start with something small and end with something deep. That has always been us. The things that bonded us together were our shared faith, our love for travel, and our quiet evenings at home that we both treasure more than fancy nights out.

What we enjoy doing together, oh my, the list is long. Cooking together, taking long walks, making playlists for absolutely no reason. We share the same values, of family, of honesty, of kindness, and of working hard for the life we want.

We boost our relationship by always making time for each other, even on the busy weeks. I appreciate you and I love you. Thank you for choosing me.

7624133b08283b55.text:
Dear colleague,

I am writing this letter to apologize for the unfortunate situation that affected your pay last month. 

What went wrong: you received a pay cut for no fault of yours, and that was deeply unfair to you. Your role in the team has been nothing but exemplary, and what happened should never have happened.

What was my role: I gave the wrong instructions to a subordinate to cut your pay, based on incomplete information that I unfortunately did not verify before acting. The responsibility for that decision sits squarely with me.

It was not intentional: I was given the wrong data regarding attendance, which forced me to issue the instructions hastily. I did it without any intention of hurting you, but intent does not undo impact, and the impact on you was very real.

Making amends: I have already revoked the instructions and have asked my subordinate to release your full pay this cycle, with apologies attached.

Assurance from my side: I shall double check such data in future to ensure this unpleasant situation does not recur.

Sincerely,
Travis

9267f94cbd924e59.text:
Dear friend,

I am kindly writing this letter to express how sorry l am for what you are going through right now. l can only imagine how heavy your heart must be, and please know that you are in my thoughts and prayers always.

l wish for you to feel better with each passing day, even if it is in the smallest ways. Healing does not come all at once, it comes in tiny pieces, and l hope you give yourself permission to take them as they come.

l would also encourage you to do small activities that keep you busy when the days feel too quiet. Maybe a short walk in the morning, or coffee with a close friend, or even just rearranging your room. The little routines can carry you when nothing else does.

l wish if l was with you at the moment, just to sit next to you and hold your hand without saying anything. The moment l can travel l will be there.

With love,
Yours dearly

783ee06c62503bf3.text:
My love,

Standing here today I want to thank you for being my support and my partner through every season we have shared. You have been there in the bright moments and in the heavy ones, and your humor, even on the worst days, has kept this love light when it could have so easily turned heavy.

I promise you my enduring love, on the days that come easy and on the days that ask everything of us. I promise to hold space for our hopes and dreams, the big shared ones and the small private ones. I commit to growing with you, with affection, with sincerity and authenticity in everything I bring to this marriage.

I am grateful for the specific qualities that make you who you are, your kindness, your patience, the way you laugh at your own jokes. I promise forgiveness when we stumble, and understanding when one of us is tired. I promise to honour our memories, our shared values, and our future plans together.

I love you, today and forever.

With love
